Home → Discography → Back with the Thugz

Back with the Thugz

2009 · Hi Power Entertainment

Released just months after Bone Thugs-N-Harmony reunited all five original members in late 2008, Bizzy Bone channeled that renewed energy into this solo album. The title refers to Bizzy Bone’s return to Hi Power Entertainment following Thugs Revenge, released three years earlier. Snoop Dogg is credited as a guest on “Let’s Get High,” but only delivers a single line.

"Khaki's freshly creased like I'm fresh out the county, howdy."

— Women Keep Watchin Us
01 Bone Unity Report produced by Makavelik ▷
02 Back with the Thugz produced by Makavelik ▷
03 Shooting at Me produced by Makavelik feat. Mr Capone-E ▷
04 Race Against Time produced by Makavelik feat. Bad Azz ▷
05 The Process produced by Makavelik ▷
06 I Wanna Sing produced by Makavelik ▷
07 On That Natural High produced by Makavelik ▷
08 That's Why Thugs Never Cry ▷
09 Let's Get High produced by Makavelik feat. Malow Mac, Snoop Dogg & Miss Lady Pinks ▷
10 Jockin' Bizzy produced by Makavelik ▷
11 Women Keep Watching Us produced by Makavelik ▷
12 End of This World "2012" produced by Makavelik ▷
13 Is There Anything Left 2 Deal With produced by Makavelik ▷
14 Bone Thug Boyz (Bonus Track) produced by Makavelik feat. Layzie Bone, Wish Bone & Krayzie Bone ▷
15 Ready for Anything (Bonus Track) produced by Makavelik feat. Southern Kappin' Soldiers ▷
16 Outro Part 2 Coming Soon produced by Makavelik ▷
